content: yeah it was either alternate triple arc1 and one arc2 or put them together
they put them together
so we got corpo instead of ryker
would still be nice to have more income for this or notify people beforehand though
and theres still the issue of missed event reruns and sr wheels
Yeah, that was another point of contention
my prediction is horla rerun event
for horla sr wheel
and then ryker tawil clem for ryker sr wheel
I argue that also increasing the pulls we get would be great.
Like let's say you wanted at least an e0 of each character if you are a complete newb
With bad luck that's 270 pulls.
Oh, and I do want for rerunned events.
What I didn't like is that they didn't warn of the change the first time, and then pack all desirable characters in the next
Hi Vendetta!
Hmm I think predicting trio isn't impossible (or at least some of them), and didn't we find out like 10 days in advance
That seems enough
But Yh maybe increasing pulls is nice
The option to know the next rerun, as the one after the new one, in advance was a way to at least help the players without giving away more silvers

As for the triple reruns, it is very overwhelming for F2P players to keep up with insane amount of farming so they can get the characters that are currently rerunning.

Imo, there should be also some “dry” patches updates, with only 1 banners rotation (phase 1 and phase 2 eventually) or less exciting events occuring in-game, so people can save up and enjoy the game at a slower pace while also knowing who to pull for and calculating the resources required for such matters (be it a new character or a rerunning one, aiming for WoD’s or E’s, etc.).

And even more than that, please, **the mistranslation is a way bigger issue to work on rather than rerunning meta units!** It is in vain to attract new players with such “flashy” facades of the game if the translation’s quality is lacking or leaving players unsatisfied!
A gacha is a gacha. Like for games that GLB players know the banners in advance, it makes people skip whole banners, which is simply bad for devs money wise
This isn't a charity tbh
I think they do enough for f2p players but we can't just expect them to give us everything we could want imo

The triple option is not bad in itself because we will have more rotations, my suggestion was to limit frustration, they can better balance the distribution of characters for that too.
The translation is another topic, and they are at least working on it, with the volunteer collaboration too.
Like every gacha I used to play I'd pull "optimally" according to future banners
I know, I know, but it is clear that this patch is somewhat forcing players’ hands into P2W or whaling. I think the focus should be on other matters, not on 3 banners.
Well, yeah, but we don't have that option
I agree but this game is genuinely quite f2p
Is my point
We do not have any official leakers.
Standards almost 2 years after release are still fine
And u get free dupe monthly
It is F2P but not *that* F2P lol.
A game is designed to make money at the end of the day
Yeah, I know, I didn't even ask to give a lot of silver, just some info in advance
Balancing short term gain, and not making players quit
Is hard tbh
At the end of the day they can do what is best for them, I gave my opinion
I think more pulls kinda needed with a lot of units nowadays needing E3+
Nah that's good <:Emoji_LT_R_02:1400771683664658433>
But it's not unreasonable for them to do that
Well, yeah, but if they don't want to give more, at least one can plan where to better spend his silver in advance
This isn’t a good strategy for them either because if E2/E3 becomes a necessity for making a time-limited character good… then they weren’t good, to begin with.
Hmm but is that not kinda fair
We get like 71 pulls a month just for one time rewards
And average unit is 45 pulls
So 180 for E3
You don’t even have a hard-pity amount of pulls from that.
So u have every other limited ready to use at a good level
I think that's quite f2p
It's just averages tho
Those are more than 2 months of optimal farming, and you can't take wheels, nor reruns
But if ur end game most ppl are coming very close to it
And again this isn't factoring in one time rewards
Which where are a ton of
My point is simply I think this is game is somewhat f2p friendly
This change will lose them money
Yeah, but the point is, it would be nice to at least be able to plan where and how to spend them in an educated manner
Balancing short term money and player satisfaction is how the dev make money
They will eventually turn into any other gacha game offering less rewards and demanding more from the players. (Hopefully it won’t be the case!)
(they already are...)
Hmm maybe it's fair ig, since trio banner will get them more money
But need to stop EoS 2
Scare
I say it just to limit potential player frustration, with at the same time not giving away more rewards
We will see what they decide
